$description: Paper — the default theme (§21). Ramp ratified 2026-07-12 (eyeball + contract pass): all adjacent register steps inside the ΔL band; grays are EXACTLY C=0 by ratification (the old 0.003–0.005 hue-275 tint read as lavender and was removed). Structure note, same date: the gray ramp is deliberately role-shaped rather than a numbered gray.N facade — with four hand-tuned themes the numbered tier adds indirection without generality; hue scales get numbered steps because twelve hues share one step grammar.

surface.$description: Chrome family. Direction: recess (derived — interaction moves toward ink, §7). Fields always recess; transient = panel on light themes (§6).

alx.role: rails, inspector, bars — the anchor. Pole-anchored to pure white (material round, 2026-07-22 eye-gate): figure/ground needs a ground; the old 0.975 compressed the family into one near-white sheet.

the canonical CONTROL-CONTAINER (D35, 2026-07-22): the ONE recessed neutral material every value/control HOLDER uses — input wells, dropdown/select triggers, neutral value chips, filled value-rows. Recesses one step below panel. Neutral containers never source from pill/hover/tint (those are selection/state/tag) — that misuse is the fragmentation D35 closes. Name predates the generalization; rename to surface.container is deferred to the component-convergence round.

the deep well for grouped controls (material round 2026-07-22): a segmented track the selection pill rises OUT of. Distinct from field (input wells): sits a solid register jump below panel in EVERY theme so the pill separates by tone, not a line. Deepened 0.95→0.91 (eye-gate) so the borderless white pill (surface.raised 1.0) pops at a ~0.09 gap. Narrowed by D35 (2026-07-22) to the SOLE deeper exception to the one-container rule — the grouped-control track only; every other neutral container uses surface.field.

the deep register step — tint Button's pressed fill. NO LONGER the selection fill (that is surface.pill, material round 2026-07-22): selection is a light object off the anchor, not a dark slab. Rename to surface.sunken is deferred cleanup.

ON-PANEL selection fill (§7, material round 2026-07-22): tabs / toggles / list rows sitting directly ON panel — a light dab just BELOW the anchor so it reads on white. Carried by ink.1 + semibold. Direction-exempt (not in the surface stepOrder).

IN-WELL selection ceiling (material round 2026-07-22): the segmented-control pill, which rises out of a sunken track to the theme's light extreme — at-or-above panel in EVERY theme, so it is the BRIGHTEST element and reads by value alone (borderless). On paper = the 1.0 ceiling; on non-anchored themes it lifts ABOVE panel. Distinct from surface.pill (which must stay below paper's white panel for on-panel tabs).
popover/menu/dialog surface (§6): equals panel on light themes

cell.$description: Asset-cell family: always raises toward the ceiling (§7 exception, §20). Even 0.014 spacing — every state one perceivable step apart (fixed 2026-07-12; the old upper steps were sub-threshold).

alx.role: family ceiling (pure white) + 1px ink hairline frame (§20)

ink.$description: 4-step ink ramp + hairline (§3), pure neutral. Ordinal names pending the type-roles round.

alx.role: primary: values, names. Deepened 0.25→0.15 (material round 2026-07-22): the top rung must sit near the pole for hierarchy to register, and it carries the selection pill's ink jump.
